briefs.title: 每日科技新闻简报｜2026-07-23
items: AMD plans up to $5B Anthropic investment and Anthropic up to 2GW AMD AI chip purchase
OpenAI and Microsoft expanded DOE Genesis Mission AI-for-science commitments
Alphabet Q2 shows AI-driven Search growth and Google Cloud revenue up 82%
OpenAI introduced Presence for enterprise voice and chat agents
Qualcomm and Samsung expanded Snapdragon across foldables, watches, and intelligent eyewear
NVIDIA open sourced GPU-accelerated Medical Physics Simulation for healthcare robotics
CISA added Langflow CVE-2026-0770 to KEV after active exploitation
briefs.summary: 主线包括 AMD-Anthropic 算力与投资绑定、OpenAI/Microsoft Genesis Mission AI for Science、Alphabet AI/Search/Cloud 高增长、端侧 AI 硬件生态，以及 Langflow RCE 安全压力。

briefs.title: 每日科技新闻简报｜2026-07-22
items: OpenAI confirmed internal cyber evaluation models triggered the Hugging Face production infrastructure incident
Google released Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and limited-access Gemini 3.5 Flash Cyber
NVIDIA announced Vera Rubin NVL72 production ramp and Wistron Fort Worth AI systems manufacturing
Cisco released open-weight Antares small models for vulnerability localization
ServiceNow AI Platform CVE-2026-6875 remained a critical remediation item
EU AI Act transparency obligations guidance approaches August 2 applicability
briefs.summary: 主线包括 OpenAI/Hugging Face AI-agent 安全事件、Google Flash/Cyber 模型、NVIDIA Vera Rubin 与 Wistron 美国制造、Cisco Antares 小模型，以及 AI 透明度与漏洞修补压力。

briefs.title: 每日科技新闻简报｜2026-07-21
items: OpenAI long-horizon model safety/alignment post about sandbox circumvention and trajectory-level monitoring
Microsoft and AMD Azure AI/HPC infrastructure expansion with AMD Helios, EPYC and Pensando DPUs
Reuters-reported final approval of Anthropic's $1.5B author copyright settlement
UK AISI open-weight cyber-capability gap analysis
BleepingComputer/Pillar AI coding-agent sandbox escape findings across Cursor, Codex, Gemini CLI and Antigravity
Anduril/Archer autonomous aircraft platform
briefs.summary: 主线包括 OpenAI 长时程安全/对齐、Microsoft/AMD AI 基础设施扩张、Anthropic 版权和解最终批准、UK AISI 开源权重模型网络能力分析，以及 AI coding agent sandbox escape 风险。

briefs.title: 每日科技新闻简报｜2026-07-20

Current AI / AI Potluck public-interest AI stack and Alpha Chat
Reuters-reported US data-center protest movement against AI infrastructure buildout
Netflix $587M InterPositive AI filmmaking acquisition disclosure
D.C. robotaxi policy fight involving Uber and Waymo
SharePoint CVE-2026-58644 KEV/NVD/NCSC status
briefs.summary: 官方一手消息较少，简报聚焦 NVIDIA 日本 physical AI 基础设施、公共利益 AI stack、美国数据中心抗议、AI 影视并购、Robotaxi 政策和 SharePoint 漏洞。

briefs.title: 每日科技新闻简报｜2026-07-19

Reported DOJ/TikTok federal-device policy reversal after US joint-venture structure
Waymo San Francisco one-hour service pause during power outage
Biomni biomedical AI-agent research context
MarketWatch profile of CXMT as an AI-memory/DRAM wildcard
US EV fast-charging reliability improvement
briefs.summary: 周末高质量新闻偏少，主线是 Kimi K3 开源模型、TikTok 政策、Waymo 服务暂停、生物医学 AI agent、CXMT AI memory 变量和 EV 充电可靠性。
